title: Day of the Sepulchral Night
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the solar eclipse|the [[Day of the Sepulchral Night (short story)|short story]]}}
{{Otheruses|Night}}
The '''Day of the Sepulchral Night''' was a rare solar eclipse on [[Zelos II]] that occurred roughly every 120 [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. When the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] fourth [[Moon/Legends|moon]] was in line with the [[Star/Legends|sun]], the tides in the [[Great Zelosi Sea]] were at their lowest, which in turn gave access to [[Zelosian's Chine]]: an underwater [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ridge.

The native [[Zelosian]]s, superstitious of the event, stayed indoors for its duration.

===Known eclipses===
*In [[196 BBY]]; a shipwrecked [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Prince/Legends|prince]] buried his treasure in Zelosian's Chine.
*In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]; the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Solum'ke]] and [[Diergu-Rea Duhnes'rd]] found the treasure but were forced to abandon most of it when the cave began to refill with water.
